ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop (e.g., paddy, rice) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "growth_cycle" INTEGER /* Growth cycle of the crop in days */,
  "water_requirement" REAL /* Water requirement of the crop in mm */,
  "fertilizer_requirement" REAL /* Fertilizer requirement of the crop in kg/ha */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_types" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil type */,
  "soil_name" TEXT /* Name of the soil type (e.g., loamy, clayey loamy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the soil characteristics */,
  "ph_min" REAL /* Minimum pH level of the soil */,
  "ph_max" REAL /* Maximum pH level of the soil */,
  "nutrient_retention" REAL /* Nutrient retention capacity of the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition record */,
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the soil type */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop type */,
  "whc" REAL /* Water holding capacity of the soil */,
  "precipitation" INTEGER /* Amount of precipitation in mm */,
  "temp_min" INTEGER /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "temp_max" INTEGER /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "ph_min" REAL /* Minimum pH level */,
  "ph_max" REAL /* Maximum pH level */,
  "sunlight_hours" INTEGER /* Average sunlight hours per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_soil_id FOREIGN KEY ("soil_id") REFERENCES soil_types ("soil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental conditions */,
  "yield_amount" REAL /* Amount of yield produced */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kg, tons) */,
  "yield_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the yield (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or organization of the researcher */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., soil science, agronomy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher leading the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_goals" TEXT /* Goals and objectives of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental conditions tested */,
  "trial_results" TEXT /* Results of the field trial */,
  "trial_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes and recommendations from the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_trials_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., satellite imagery) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., remote sensing, field data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation recorded in mm */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded in km/h */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remote_sensing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remote sensing data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the remote sensing data */,
  "satellite_image" TEXT /* Satellite image used for analysis */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used (e.g., multispectral, hyperspectral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remote_sensing_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop recommendation */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental conditions */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended crop */,
  "fertilizer_application" TEXT /* Fertilizer application schedule */,
  "irrigation_schedule" TEXT /* Irrigation schedule for the recommended crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_recommendations_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_recommendations_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("condition_id")
)
